nobelLaureates.name: Rabindranath Tagore
nobelLaureates.connection: Born in Kolkata; founded Visva-Bharati University at Shantiniketan; wrote the national anthems of India and Bangladesh

nobelLaureates.name: Amartya Sen
nobelLaureates.connection: Born in Shantiniketan; educated at Presidency College, Kolkata; recognised for work on welfare economics

nobelLaureates.name: Abhijit Vinayak Banerjee
nobelLaureates.connection: Born in Kolkata; studied at Presidency College and JNU; awarded for experimental approach to alleviating global poverty

iconicFigures.name: Satyajit Ray
iconicFigures.note: Academy Honorary Award; director of Pather Panchali

iconicFigures.name: Subhas Chandra Bose
iconicFigures.note: Netaji; founder of the Indian National Army

iconicFigures.name: Mother Teresa
iconicFigures.note: Nobel Peace Prize 1979; lived and served in Kolkata

iconicFigures.name: Jagadish Chandra Bose
iconicFigures.note: Pioneer of radio waves and plant biology

iconicFigures.name: Satyendra Nath Bose
iconicFigures.note: Bose-Einstein statistics; the boson is named after him

iconicFigures.name: Jhumpa Lahiri
iconicFigures.note: Pulitzer Prize winner for Interpreter of Maladies

iconicFigures.name: Kazi Nazrul Islam
iconicFigures.note: Rebel Poet; national poet of Bangladesh

destinations.name: Kolkata
destinations.highlight: Cultural capital, Victoria Memorial, Howrah Bridge

destinations.name: Darjeeling
destinations.highlight: Tea gardens, Himalayan views, Toy Train (UNESCO)

destinations.name: Sundarbans
destinations.highlight: Largest mangrove forest, Royal Bengal Tiger

destinations.name: Siliguri
destinations.highlight: Gateway to Northeast India, trade hub

quote.text: Where the mind is without fear and the head is held high; Where knowledge is free...
quote.author: Rabindranath Tagore
